extracted_equations.text: \frac{dC}{dt} = -S \cdot C + \text{(external pulses)} \;\;\longrightarrow\;\; \frac{dC}{dt} = O \cdot G(1-C) - S \cdot C
= Father (“Let there be” — generates the space).
= Son (“through him all things hold together”).

= Spirit (“it was so”). The Born Rule requires all three and cannot reduce to two. Six biblical events, six applications, three columns — never reducible, never expandable. Flood Phase Transition ↔ Three-Person Simultaneous Operation The Flood row connects to The Decoherence Curve 's finding (
= inner product (overlap amplitude). Plain English: the probability of observing outcome
= the measurement basis (the set of all possible observable eigenstates).
= external pulsed grace injections (prophets, Law, revivals) that decay between pulses. Plain English: coherence decays at rate
= grace, now a continuous internal term, not external pulses.
= the room left to grow into. Plain English: grace is now continuous and internal. The system can sustain coherence indefinitely as long as

= decoherence time constant; how long coherence persists before degrading. Plain English: the Flood is the phase transition. Before: indefinite stability. After: 214-year half-life on coherence (cf. The Decoherence Curve ). All three persons operate at the transition. Glossary Key terms used in this article. State Vector (
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
Spirit $|\cdot|^2$ (actualization) Collapses potential into actual The thing that makes it REAL. Movement. Power. “The Spirit moved over the waters.”
$$\frac{dC}{dt} = -S \cdot C + \text{(external pulses)} \;\;\longrightarrow\;\; \frac{dC}{dt} = O \cdot G(1-C) - S \cdot C$$
